title: MSIandHud
description:
Adds a performance overlay to your HUD showing FPS, CPU usage, RAM and VRAM — inspired by MSI Afterburner. Toggle it anytime with a customizable keybind.

Enjoy!
body:
# MSIandHud

**MSIandHud** is a lightweight client-side mod that displays a real-time performance overlay directly on your Minecraft HUD, inspired by MSI Afterburner.

## Features

- **FPS counter** — color-coded: green (60+), yellow (30-59), red (<30)
- **CPU usage** — color-coded: blue (<50%), orange (50-79%), red (80%+)
- **RAM usage** — shows used / total memory in MB
- **GPU name** — displays your graphics card model
- **VRAM usage** — shows estimated video memory usage

## How to use

Once installed, the overlay will appear automatically in the **top-left corner** of your screen.

Press **F4** (configurable) to **show or hide** the overlay at any time. You can change the keybind in **Options → Controls → Miscellaneous**.

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader 0.18.1+
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu

## Credits

Made by **SrBeats**
